ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "au_size" INTEGER /* Australian size equivalent */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Recommended cup size range */,
  "recommended_sizes" TEXT /* JSON column to store a list of recommended sizes for different body types */,
  "measurement_chart" TEXT /* JSON column to store detailed measurement charts for each size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Preferred size according to the size guide */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the platform */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Customer's body type (e.g., hourglass, pear, apple) */,
  "measurement_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store the customer's body measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES size_guides ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the product price */,
  "available_sizes" TEXT /* Available sizes for the product, stored as a comma-separated list */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_images" TEXT /* JSON column to store URLs of product images */,
  "available_colors" TEXT /* JSON column to store available colors for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order from which the product is being returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., wrong size, defective) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement guideline */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size for which the measurement applies */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hips) */,
  "instruction" TEXT /* Instruction on how to take the measurement */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image demonstrating the measurement */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video demonstrating the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_guides ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the customer */,
  "is_helpful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer found the size guide helpful */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Specific suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_guides ("size_id")
)
